arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest boss Nuno sends simple demand to Champions League hopefuls
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are in the Champions League mix and are dreaming of a seat at Europe's top table once again - but Nuno Espirito Santo admits they must do more to get where they want to go

arts.ttl: Newcastle United are one of my favourite clubs but Leeds United are better bet to disrupt top 6
arts.sum: Sheffield United's manager Chris Wilder has lavished praise on Leeds United, hailing them as a 'powerhouse of English football' and going as far as questioning whether they might be considered bigger than the world's richest club-owned Newcastle United . And he goes further than that by insisting the Whites are the club who can challenge the traditional big guns in the Premier league and break into the top six ahead of Newcastle and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: £17.5m Nottingham Forest star 'not happy' at the City Ground as Nuno could seek replacement - journalist
Newcastle United's James Trafford masterstroke as £20m stance set to change
arts.sum: Newcastle United's interest in Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford remains - and you suspect any previous doubters may have been won over by the in-form stopper in recent months. The Magpies were linked with a move for Trafford, 22, in the summer but on the back of a dismal season on both personal and collective levels at Burnley, many outside voices were urging Eddie Howe and his transfer team to look elsewhere.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich tried to sign him for £70m but Nottingham Forest ended up getting him for 23x less
arts.sum: How did Forest pull that off?

arts.ttl: The Newcastle United January boardroom plea that was granted for Eddie Howe
arts.sum: And while Newcastle could arguably have coped without Dubravka with Odysseas Vlachodimos and John Ruddy on the books as back-up for Pope, Howe said at his Press conference today: "I thought he was important in January and we definitely didn't want to de-stabilise the team or the group with a departure in a position we couldn't afford. The Swedish defender is something of a utility player in the squad, capable of playing in a number of roles and with Jamaal Lascelles not close to returning yet, Krafth offers cover as a right-sided centre half as well as at full-back.

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Nott’m Forest: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Newcastle v Nott’m Forest: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Report: Inside details on Elliot Anderson to Nottingham revealed as transfer almost collapsed
arts.sum: Elliot Anderson has been a standout signing for Nottingham Forest, but the deal to sign the midfielder from Newcastle United almost fell through. Anderson signed...

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe underlines one key word ahead of Newcastle United vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Forest also head to Newcastle on the back of a defeat, after losing 2-1 at Fulham last weekend, but Howe knows that his team must stay open minded regardless of how the game unfolds. But the Toon boss has thrown down the gauntlet to his players give the crowd something to feed off after back to back home defeats in the Premier League at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: 'I played for Newcastle with Alan Shearer - he didn't speak to me for at least two weeks'
arts.sum: Craig Bellamy has explained that Alan Shearer didn't speak to him for around two weeks when Sir Bobby Robson brought him to Newcastle United in 2001
